# skill-builder — Ming's Claude Code skills

> Self-made Claude Code agent skills, auto-published daily from the author's machine.
> Each is a working SKILL.md the author actually uses; adapt personal context to yourself.

## Skills

- product-experience-officer: zero-experience first-time-user product audit (screenshots or live-driving the product), PM-ready findings with severity, fixes, effort
- morning-brief: overnight cross-session work digest + five evidence-based efficiency suggestions, delivered while you sleep
- prompt4ming: voice-dictated messy multi-task prompts → atomic English specs, nothing added
- prompt-craft: casual ideas → AI-ready prompts, with a bring-your-own local knowledge layer
- coffee-brewing: photo-based coffee dial-in assistant with bean memory (hardware-specific template)

## Install

Clone and copy a skill folder into ~/.claude/skills/. Source: https://github.com/m1nga/skill-builder
